response.justification: While Maria has extensive software engineering experience, strong mentoring capabilities, and a solid background in distributed web platforms, she falls significantly short of the core minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. Her professional background is heavily focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief 7-month stint using C/C++ over a decade ago. Given the role's strong emphasis on deep C++ expertise and low-level cloud compute platform infrastructure, she is not a suitable match for this specific position.
strengths: Strong background in technical mentoring, organizing workshops, and establishing software craftsmanship practices like TDD.
Extensive experience designing and launching distributed systems and microservices architectures.
Demonstrated ability to own large, ambiguous technical projects, including founding an open-source k8s-deployed platform.
concerns: Critically lacks the required 8 years of C++ programming experience, possessing less than one year professionally.
Background is heavily skewed towards full-stack web and application development rather than low-level compute infrastructure.
Lacks extensive formal experience leading and mentoring specifically within deep cloud architecture or DevOps teams.
